how to tell if Filipinos use ChatGPT according to Americans:

1. they use of "would've been" instead of "would of been"
2. no double negatives
3. "nuclear" is spelled and pronounced right
4. using conjunction "than" instead of "then" in comparisons
5. correct grammar in general
